# Security Policy

## Reporting a Vulnerability

If you discover a security vulnerability within this project, please send an email to [your-email@example.com]. All security vulnerabilities will be promptly addressed.

**Please do NOT report security vulnerabilities through public GitHub issues.**

## Disclosure Policy

When the security team receives a security bug report, they will assign it to a primary handler. This person will coordinate the fix and release process, involving the following steps:

1. Confirm the problem and determine the affected versions.
2. Audit code to find any potential similar problems.
3. Prepare fixes for all releases still under maintenance. These fixes will be released as fast as possible.

## Security Related Configuration

- Ensure that all dependencies are up to date
- Use environment variables for sensitive data
- Never commit secrets or API keys to the repository

## Known Security Gaps & Future Enhancements

- [ ] Add automated security scanning
- [ ] Implement dependency vulnerability checking
- [ ] Add code signing for releases

## Contact

For any security concerns, please contact us at [your-email@example.com].
